title: CSP header missing on prerendered (SSG) routes — move remaining routes off prerender

tasks.title: Convert legal routes (terminos, privacidad, cookies) to SSR
tasks.description: Remove `export const prerender = true` and `getStaticPaths` from apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/legal/{terminos,privacidad,cookies}/index.astro. Switch locale read from `Astro.params.lang` to `Astro.locals.locale as SupportedLocale` (per web CLAUDE.md gotcha; matches the home-page SSR pattern in pages/[lang]/index.astro). Verify each still renders identically. Tests: covered by the generalized guard in T-007 + over-the-wire test in T-008; no per-route unit test (Astro pages have no Vitest DOM renderer).

tasks.title: Convert nosotros, preguntas-frecuentes, contacto to SSR
tasks.description: Remove prerender + getStaticPaths from apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/{nosotros,preguntas-frecuentes,contacto}/index.astro; switch to Astro.locals.locale. Same pattern as T-001. Verify render parity.

tasks.title: Convert colaborar routes (index, editores, reportar, fotos) to SSR
tasks.description: Remove prerender + getStaticPaths from apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/colaborar/{index,editores/index,reportar/index,fotos/index}.astro; switch to Astro.locals.locale. Same pattern as T-001.

tasks.title: Convert beneficios, suscriptores/propietarios, guest/messages/verify-expired to SSR
tasks.description: Remove prerender + getStaticPaths from apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/{beneficios/index,suscriptores/propietarios/index,guest/messages/verify-expired}.astro; switch to Astro.locals.locale. verify-expired may read a token from the URL — confirm it still works as SSR (it likely benefits from SSR anyway). Same base pattern as T-001.

tasks.title: Document beta/[...slug] as the intentional prerender exception
tasks.description: OWNER DECISION (2026-07-04): beta/[...slug].astro STAYS prerendered — it is private, noindex/nofollow beta docs kept prerendered for resilience, accepted to ship WITHOUT CSP. Do NOT convert it. This task = record the exception: update the file's JSDoc to state it is the deliberate CSP exception (ref HOS-74), and ensure the spec + Linear issue note it. The T-007 no-prerender guard must allowlist exactly this one file. No code behavior change to the route itself.

subtasks.title: Add JSDoc note: intentional CSP exception (HOS-74)
Ensure spec + Linear record the exception

tasks.title: Correct the misleading CSP prerender comment in middleware.ts
tasks.description: apps/web/src/middleware.ts ~L294-305: the comment claims context.isPrerendered makes the CSP header reach static pages. That is false — middleware does not run per-request for prerendered routes; the header is discarded. Rewrite the comment to state the real mechanism (staticHeaders only captures native security.csp output; prerendered routes bypass middleware at runtime) so no future reader re-introduces prerender expecting CSP. The `context.isPrerendered` branch itself becomes dead for these routes once converted — decide whether to keep it as defensive or note why it stays.

tasks.title: Generalize the no-prerender test guard to all web pages (allowlist beta)
tasks.description: apps/web/src/lib/__tests__/csp-middleware.test.ts currently locks in only that pages/[lang]/index.astro has no prerender. Replace with a guard that asserts NO page under apps/web/src/pages declares `export const prerender = true` EXCEPT the explicit allowlist { 'beta/[...slug].astro' } (the intentional CSP exception, T-005), so a regression on any of the 13 converted routes fails CI while beta staying prerendered does not. Keep it fast (source scan). Document why beta is allowlisted in the test.

tasks.title: Add over-the-wire CSP regression test
tasks.description: The existing suite only string-matches middleware source (its own JSDoc flags this gap). Add a test that BUILDS apps/web, starts the @astrojs/node standalone server, fetches a former-prerender route (e.g. /es/legal/terminos/), and asserts the response carries a non-empty `content-security-policy` header matching the enforce-mode policy. Decide (OQ-2) whether it runs in normal CI or a dedicated job given the build+server cost. This is the test class that would have caught HOS-74.

subtasks.title: Harness: build + start standalone server + teardown
Fetch a former-prerender route, assert CSP header present

tasks.title: Local verification + perf/cache sign-off
tasks.description: Build apps/web, run the standalone server, curl all 14 former-prerender routes: assert HTTP 200 + content-security-policy header present, unknown lang still 404s, and cache-control headers still allow edge caching (perf sign-off, AC-5). Record the sign-off note on the Linear issue. Add status-needs-smoke-staging label for the post-deploy live curl gate (AC-7).

subtasks.title: cache-control / perf sign-off note on Linear
